mapper.sql: rdp_verify_code.id id, rdp_verify_code.gmt_create gmt_create, rdp_verify_code.gmt_modified gmt_modified, rdp_verify_code.account_type account_type, rdp_verify_code.uid uid, rdp_verify_code.verify_type verify_type, rdp_verify_code.email email, rdp_verify_code.phone phone, rdp_verify_code.phone_area_code phone_area_code, rdp_verify_code.verify_code verify_code, rdp_verify_code.verify_code_type verify_code_type, rdp_verify_code.verify_code_send_time verify_code_send_time, rdp_verify_code.fail_times fail_times, rdp_verify_code.last_fail_date last_fail_date
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rdp_verify_code WHERE verify_type = #{verifyType,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.console.web.constants.VerifyType} AND verify_code_type=#{verifyCodeType,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.console.web.constants.VerifyCodeType} AND email=#{email} AND account_type='PRIMARY_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
FROM rdp_verify_code WHERE verify_type = #{verifyType,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.console.web.constants.VerifyType} AND verify_code_type=#{verifyCodeType,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.console.web.constants.VerifyCodeType} AND phone=#{phone} AND account_type='PRIMARY_ACCOUNT'
